name: EagleView Aerial Imagery and Analytics API
what_it_does: EagleView aerial imagery and property analytics REST API for roof measurement, property condition assessment, and insurance analytics. Enables AI agents to manage aerial roof measurement report ordering and delivery for insurance underwriting and claims automation, handle property change detection and condition monitoring for portfolio risk management, access 3D property modeling data for construction estimation automation, retrieve solar potential analysis and panel layout data for solar sales automation, manage insurance premium analytics from aerial property data for underwriting workflow, handle catastrophe exposure analytics for insurance portfolio management, access property footprint and structure data for real estate analytics, retrieve utility infrastructure inspection data for asset management, manage municipality property assessment data for government analytics, and integrate EagleView with insurance core systems, solar CRM, and property analytics platforms.
use_cases: Ordering roof measurement reports from insurance underwriting agents
Detecting property changes from portfolio monitoring agents
Assessing storm damage from claims automation agents
Analyzing solar potential from solar sales agents
not_for: Street-level imagery without aerial property focus
Consumer mapping without commercial property analytics
best_when: A P&C insurer, roofing contractor, solar installer, or government assessor wanting AI agents to automate aerial property measurement, risk assessment, storm damage detection, and solar potential analysis.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING AERIAL INSURANCE ANALYTICS RISK: Automated insurance underwriting using aerial property analytics must be validated for disparate impact on protected class neighborhoods; aerial condition scoring correlated with geographic redlining creates Fair Housing Act exposure. Appraisal independence — automated property valuation using EagleView aerial data in mortgage origination must comply with FIRREA appraisal independence requirements; aerial imagery analytics do not substitute for licensed appraisal. Privacy in aerial surveillance — automated property monitoring through repeated aerial photography creates property owner privacy concerns in jurisdictions with emerging aerial surveillance laws; verify state laws on commercial aerial surveillance. Storm claim scope accuracy — automated storm damage scope from aerial imagery may miss ground-level damage; automated insurance claim settlement based solely on aerial scope creates underpayment claim disputes.

auth.notes: EagleView uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Bellevue, Washington HQ. Founded 2008. Private (Vista Equity Partners PE, acquired 2023 ~$3.5B). Aerial imagery and analytics. 500M+ US property coverage. Insurance, solar, and government customers. Original aerial measurement leader for roofing. Competes with Nearmap, Verisk (AIR), and CoreLogic for property aerial analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-report transaction pricing
pricing.notes: Bellevue, Washington. Vista Equity Partners (acquired 2023 ~$3.5B). Founded 2008. 500M+ US property coverage. Insurance and roofing leader. Competes with Nearmap.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; report generation is async (minutes to hours)

known_agent_gotchas: ASYNC REPORT GENERATION: EagleView measurement reports take minutes to hours; automated workflows must implement webhook or polling — do not assume synchronous delivery for large or complex properties

Fair Housing underwriting disparate impact — automated insurance underwriting using aerial property condition analytics must be validated for disparate impact by geography and protected class; aerial scoring correlated with redlined neighborhoods creates FHA exposure

Imagery vintage lag — EagleView imagery is captured periodically, not continuously; automated property condition assessment may use imagery that predates recent changes; verify imagery date in automated workflows before claim decisions

Ground-level damage gaps — aerial imagery cannot detect all storm damage; automated insurance claim scope based solely on aerial data misses interior damage, chimney, and fascia issues; supplement with field adjuster for complete scope
CAT surge processing times — catastrophe events create massive aerial report request volume; automated claim workflows must implement longer timeout and retry logic during CAT events
Report cancellation — automated ordering workflows must implement cancellation for duplicate orders; EagleView charges per report regardless of whether result is used
agent_readiness.security_notes: Aerial property analytics. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Property imagery and analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aerial property data. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Property imagery and measurement data.
